description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden cabinet with a single ornate front door and a lower drawer, featuring classic carved detailing on the door and base. The cabinet stands on four short, curved legs and has a slightly protruding top with beveled edges, giving it a traditional, vintage appearance. The front door is framed with decorative molding and includes a small handle, while the lower drawer is subtly integrated with a matching handle. The sides are plain and flat, lacking any additional ornamentation, and the back panel is constructed from a visibly different wood grain, suggesting a solid wood build. The finish is matte, with a muted brown color that highlights the wood texture. This cabinet is suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, hallways, or garages for storage purposes.
description: A tall, narrow, vintage-style wooden cabinet with a single ornate front door, lower drawer, and classic carved details. Finished in matte brown, it stands on four curved legs and features a solid wood construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate door, lower drawer, and decorative molding.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat panel with no visible handles or ornamentation.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid wood back panel with visible wood grain and a horizontal support bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain, flat panel and a slight glimpse of the door handle.
